CAD.Title: Character Art Drawer
CAD.NoPermission: You do not have permission to update this actor.
CAD.NoTokenImage: This actor has no prototype token image.
CAD.NoActiveScene: There is no active scene to update tokens on.
CAD.NoSceneTokens: The active scene has no linked tokens for this actor.
CAD.SceneTokensAlreadyCurrent: Active scene tokens already use the current image.
CAD.SceneTokensUpdateFailed: Scene tokens could not be updated.
CAD.FilePickerUnavailable: The Foundry file picker is not available.
CAD.DeleteDoesNotRemoveFile: Removing this entry does not delete the file. The active image remains on the actor and may reappear after refresh.
CAD.ActiveImageCannotDelete: The active image cannot be removed from the drawer.
CAD.HardDeleteOn: Hard delete is on. Removing images will delete files from disk.
CAD.HardDeleteEnabled: Hard delete enabled. Removing images will delete files from disk.
CAD.HardDeleteSuccess: File deleted and removed from history.
CAD.HardDeleteFailed: The file could not be deleted.
CAD.HardDeleteUnsupported: This Foundry version does not expose a file deletion API to modules.
CAD.HardDeleteGMOnly: Only a GM can hard-delete image files.
CAD.HardDeleteRemoteUnsupported: Remote URLs cannot be hard-deleted from Foundry.
CAD.HardDeleteUnsafePath: This file path is not safe to hard-delete.
CAD.HardDeleteActiveElsewhere: This file is active on the actor and cannot be hard-deleted.
CAD.Settings.DefaultMode.Name: Default gallery mode
CAD.Settings.DefaultMode.Hint: Which mode opens by default when the art drawer is opened.
CAD.Settings.AutoCapture.Name: Automatically remember externally changed images
CAD.Settings.AutoCapture.Hint: When enabled, avatar and prototype token images changed outside the drawer are added to the actor gallery.
CAD.Settings.UpdateSceneTokens.Name: Update active scene tokens when prototype token image changes
CAD.Settings.UpdateSceneTokens.Hint: When enabled, changing token art also updates matching linked tokens on the active scene. Prototype token is always updated.
CAD.Settings.HardDeleteByDefault.Name: Enable hard delete by default
CAD.Settings.HardDeleteByDefault.Hint: When enabled, new art drawers open with hard delete active. Hard delete attempts to remove files from disk, not only from history.
